_meta._source: Manually digitized from the 2023 top-down spec sheets (Z:\Sales1\Sales\SPEC SHEET - TOP DOWN 2023\). One layout per booth shell shape.

_schema.exterior: Outer shell dimensions in inches (w = long axis, h = short axis). Matches the spec-sheet top-down view.
_schema.walls: Keyed by compass side: N = back, S = front (door side), E = right, W = left.
_schema.walls.<side>.slots: Ordered list of wall-panel slots running along the interior. Each slot has: id (unique), size (inches, matches STDWL{N}/IEPWL{N}), family (STDWL{N} family string used to match BOM lines), prefers (ordered list of slot-kind preferences for auto-placement — VNT, CBL, DRFRM, WDO, SOLID).
_schema.walls.<side>.longSide: true for the two long walls of a rectangular booth (where panels are split N-wide + N-narrow style).

_meta._lookup: Lookup by full MDL name (e.g. 'MDL 4872 S'). Variant fallback (e.g. 'MDL 4872 E' → 'MDL 4872 S' layout) is handled in lib/packing-list.js boothLayout().
